questions.question: How was the person regarded by others?
questions.answers: He was despised and rejected by men; people hid their faces from him; he was not esteemed.

questions.question: What kind of person was he?
questions.answers: A man of sorrows, acquainted with grief (suffering illness/affliction).

questions.question: What did people do toward him (behavior/emotion)?
questions.answers: They treated him with contempt, and they did not consider him or give him value (they did not esteem him).
